CREATE TABLE PL_Module (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), description TEXT);
INSERT INTO PL_Module (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'ModuleA', 'Description for Module A');
INSERT INTO PL_Module (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'ModuleB', 'Description for Module B');
CREATE TABLE Procedures (id INT PRIMARY KEY, module_id INT, proc_name VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY(module_id) REFERENCES PL_Module(id));
INSERT INTO Procedures (id, module_id, proc_name) VALUES (1, 1, 'Procedure1');
INSERT INTO Procedures (id, module_id, proc_name) VALUES (2, 1, 'Procedure2');
INSERT INTO Procedures (id, module_id, proc_name) VALUES (3, 2, 'Procedure3');
CREATE TABLE WSDL_Document (id INT PRIMARY KEY, module_id INT, wsdl_content TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(module_id) REFERENCES PL_Module(id));
INSERT INTO WSDL_Document (id, module_id, wsdl_content) VALUES (1, 1, 'WSDL Content for ModuleA');
INSERT INTO WSDL_Document (id, module_id, wsdl_content) VALUES (2, 2, 'WSDL Content for ModuleB');
SELECT soap_wsdl('ModuleA') AS wsdl_output FROM dual;
SELECT soap_wsdl('ModuleB') AS wsdl_output FROM dual;
SELECT p.proc_name, w.wsdl_content FROM Procedures p JOIN WSDL_Document w ON p.module_id = w.module_id WHERE p.id = 1;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT module_id, COUNT(*) AS procedure_count FROM Procedures GROUP BY module_id) AS subquery WHERE procedure_count > 1;
SELECT w.wsdl_content FROM WSDL_Document w WHERE EXISTS (SELECT * FROM Procedures p WHERE p.module_id = w.module_id AND p.proc_name LIKE 'Procedure%');
SELECT w.wsdl_content FROM WSDL_Document w WHERE w.wsdl_content IS NOT NULL;
SELECT soap_wsdl((SELECT name FROM PL_Module WHERE id = 1)) AS wsdl_output;
CREATE TABLE Extended_Procedures (id INT PRIMARY KEY, original_x INT, detail TEXT);
INSERT INTO Extended_Procedures (id, original_x, detail) VALUES (1, 1, 'Detailed Procedure 1');
INSERT INTO Extended_Procedures (id, original_x, detail) VALUES (2, 1, 'Detailed Procedure 2');
SELECT soap_wsdl(EP.detail) AS wsdl_output FROM Extended_Procedures EP JOIN Procedures P ON EP.original_x = P.id WHERE EP.id = 1;
